purpose: FLW MED (bw7ac7zmr): the raw-agreement rows may carry a SHARED Audiveris error. This logs their verification STATUS + the independent cross-checks now available. NOT a clearance. Court of record = Jon (A4).
rule: A raw-agreement row rests on Audiveris OMR. No binding verdict is written for these rows (FLW HIGH) until Jon or a reconciled independent read clears them.

independent_corroboration_AVAILABLE.source: TWO independent human page-read manifests (lida-baritone + lida-lead printed-manifest), reconciled onto the engraving via measure-map.json (MIDI, enharmonic-safe).
independent_corroboration_AVAILABLE.result: ALL 12 audit points AGREE with the engraving. The baritone printed-audit m9/m18/m31 FAILs were numbering+spelling ARTIFACTS, not errors.
independent_corroboration_AVAILABLE.note: 12 bars now have a second signal (not Audiveris). Of the 5 BLOCKING: m21 and m29 gain harmonic context (their corroborated Lead notes Cb4/Eb4 make the Baritone unison/octave-double natural). m9 stays the genuine outlier. Extending: oemer second-OMR (deferred) would widen coverage to all rows.

numbering_locked: measure-map.json — page-196=eng[1-9], page-197=eng[10-21], page-198=eng[22-34/35]. The 4-way numbering conflict is resolved; the silent-offset risk (FLW #1) is closed.
decision: Provisional. Most raw-agreement rows still rest on Audiveris alone and enter Jon A4. Vision-sampling on dense crops REJECTED as unreliable (m5/m21/m29 two-eye scatter). The reconciled printed-manifest is the working independent-signal pattern; extend it (Lead manifest / oemer) to widen coverage next.
